app.title: Scam Shield
stats.title: Stats
about.title: About
scan.title: Scan
scan.subtitle: Paste a link, message, or scan a screenshot to check for scams.
scan.input.label: Link or message
scan.example: Example: Your account is locked. Verify at https://secure-login-paypaI.com
scan.aiQuota.free: AI Pro uses left this week: {remaining}/{limit} (Unlimited with Premium)
about.description: AI scam scanner that helps detect suspicious links and messages.
about.privacyDescription: Review the current privacy policy inside the app.
result.title: Result
result.action.noReply: Do not reply to the message.
result.action.block: Block the sender and do not click any links.
result.action.delete: Delete the message after reporting it if needed.
result.action.report: Report it to your bank / provider if it involves money.
result.action.verify: Verify via official channels (type the URL yourself).
result.action.low.stayCautious: Stay cautious if the sender later asks for personal data, payment, or login codes.
result.action.low.verifyIfUnusual: Verify via official channels if anything feels unusual.
result.checklist.title: Verification checklist
result.checklist.low.sender: Check that the sender matches the expected official source.
result.checklist.low.links: Review links before opening them, especially if they ask you to log in.
result.checklist.low.requests: Stay alert if the message later asks for payment, passwords, or codes.
result.checklist.risky.doNotClick: Do not click links or download files from the message.
result.checklist.risky.officialWebsite: Open the official website by typing the address yourself.
result.checklist.risky.contactProvider: Contact the bank, provider, or service through official channels.
result.checklist.risky.neverShareCodes: Never share passwords, verification codes, card details, or seed phrases.
result.checklist.risky.report: Report the message to the provider if money, accounts, or personal data are involved.
errors.weeklyLimitExceeded: You have reached the free weekly scan limit. Go Premium for unlimited scans.
errors.aiLimitExceeded: AI Pro reached the free weekly limit. Go Premium for unlimited AI analysis.
errors.rateLimited: Please wait a few seconds before scanning again.
errors.imageScanNoText: No readable text was detected in the image.
errors.imageScanFailed: Could not read the image. Try another screenshot.
reasons.URL_TYPO: The URL contains a suspicious typo (possible impersonation).
reasons.SHORTENER: The link uses a URL shortener.
reasons.URGENCY_LANGUAGE: The message uses urgency or pressure tactics.
reasons.SENSITIVE_DATA: The message asks for sensitive data (password, card, codes).
reasons.SUSPICIOUS_TLD: The link uses a suspicious domain extension (TLD).
reasons.IP_URL: The link uses a raw IP address instead of a domain.
reasons.SUSPICIOUS_PATH: The link contains suspicious login/verification keywords.
reasons.MANY_SUBDOMAINS: The link uses many subdomains, which is common in impersonation scams.
premium.iapNotReady: IAP not wired yet. Use backend admin toggle for testing.
subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.subtitle: Manage your subscription settings.
subscription.manageHint: You can cancel renewal or update billing details from the subscription screen.
errors.weeklyAndAiLimitExceeded: AI Pro and normal scan reached the free weekly limit. Go Premium for unlimited access.
